_meta.description: Per-team quantitative + qualitative profiles feeding model_v2. Recent goals from last ~6-12 internationals (2024-2026), gathered via Wikipedia/search. Refreshed manually when needed.

Germany.note: 6-0 Slovakia, 4-3 Switzerland. Attack flowing under Nagelsmann (Wirtz, Musiala, Havertz). Schedule minnow-padded (Lux/NI/Svk) so attack slightly inflated.

Curacao.note: Smallest nation ever to qualify. Blown out 1-5 by Australia and 0-2 by China in friendlies — defense collapses vs quality. Attack padded by 7-0 vs Bermuda.

Netherlands.note: 24 goals in 12. But warning signs: lost 0-1 Algeria (June 3), drew Ecuador 1-1. Depay/Gakpo carry the goals.

Japan.note: Elite defense (0.58 GA/game). Beat Brazil 3-2, England 1-0, Scotland 1-0. In superb form. Eighth straight WC. Technical, compact, deadly transitions.

Ivory Coast.note: Beat France 2-1, South Korea 4-0. AFCON 2023 winners core. Amad Diallo on fire (5 goals recent). Pace on the wings.

Ecuador.note: Beat Argentina 1-0, drew Netherlands 1-1. Very low-scoring, elite defensive organization. Caicedo anchors. Valencia (36) the focal point but ageing.

Sweden.note: Qualified via play-offs (3-1 Ukraine, 3-2 Poland), didn't top group. Coach Tomasson sacked Oct 2025 after home loss to Kosovo, Graham Potter in. Isak + Gyokeres elite attack but defense leaks (1.5 GA/game).

Tunisia.note: Qualified for 2026 WC without conceding a single goal. Ultra-disciplined block. Low-scoring, set-piece reliant. Hard to break down.
